scripts.install:all: npm -w apps/admin install && npm -w services/api install && npm -w services/ai-gateway install && npm -w services/ingest install && npm -w services/receipts install && npm -w services/analytics install
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k -n admin,api,ai,ingest,receipts,analytics "npm -w apps/admin run dev" "npm -w services/api run dev" "npm -w services/ai-gateway run dev" "npm -w services/ingest run dev" "npm -w services/receipts run dev" "npm -w services/analytics run dev"
